Class RestaurantSettingsController

java.lang.Object
logicControllers.RestaurantSettingsController
public class RestaurantSettingsController extends Object
Controller class responsible for managing restaurant settings, including opening hours, special dates, and table capacity. It coordinates between the Data Access Objects (DAOs) and the application state.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final RestaurantSettingsDAO
    dao
    Data access object for general restaurant settings.
    private final ReservationDAO
    reservationDAO
    Data access object for handling reservations.
    private final RestaurantSettings
    restaurantSettings
    The singleton instance of the restaurant settings.
    private final SpecialDatesDAO
    SPdao
    Data access object for special holiday or exceptional dates.

  • Field Details

    • restaurantSettings

      private final RestaurantSettings restaurantSettings
      The singleton instance of the restaurant settings.

    • dao

      private final RestaurantSettingsDAO dao
      Data access object for general restaurant settings.

      private final SpecialDatesDAO SPdao
      Data access object for special holiday or exceptional dates.

      private final ReservationDAO reservationDAO

  • Constructor Details

    • RestaurantSettingsController

      public RestaurantSettingsController()
      Initializes a new RestaurantSettingsController and instantiates the necessary DAOs.

  • Method Details

    • getRestaurantSettings

      public RestaurantSettings getRestaurantSettings()
      Retrieves the current restaurant settings from the database. Fetches both the weekly opening hours and special dates, ensuring the returned object is up-to-date with the database.
      Returns:
      a RestaurantSettings object populated with data from the DB.

    • getMaxTables

      public int getMaxTables()
      Gets the maximum number of tables available in the restaurant.
      Returns:
      the total number of tables.

    • updateMaxTables

      public boolean updateMaxTables(int newMaxTables)
      Updates the maximum table capacity in the system and the database.
      Parameters:
      newMaxTables - the new maximum number of tables.
      Returns:
      true if the database update was successful, false otherwise.

    • getOpeningHoursForDay

      public WeeklyOpeningHours getOpeningHoursForDay(Day day)
      Retrieves the standard opening hours for a specific day of the week.
      Parameters:
      day - the day of the week (e.g., MONDAY).
      Returns:
      the WeeklyOpeningHours for that day.

    • getOpeningHoursForDate

      public WeeklyOpeningHours getOpeningHoursForDate(LocalDate date)
      Retrieves the opening hours for a specific calendar date. Checks if a special date configuration exists first; otherwise, returns the standard weekly hours.
      Parameters:
      date - the specific date to check.
      Returns:
      the opening and closing times applicable to that date.

    • getAllWeeklyOpeningHours

      public List<WeeklyOpeningHours> getAllWeeklyOpeningHours()
      Fetches all weekly opening hours from the database and updates the local settings.
      Returns:
      a list of all WeeklyOpeningHours entries.

    • getAllSpecialDates

      public List<SpecialDates> getAllSpecialDates()
      Fetches all special dates from the database and updates the local settings.
      Returns:
      a list of all SpecialDates.

    • addSpecialDate

      public boolean addSpecialDate(AddSpecialDateRequest specialDate)
      Adds a special date to the system via a request message object.
      Parameters:
      specialDate - the request object containing the special date details.
      Returns:
      true if added successfully to the database.

    • getHoursForDay

      public WeeklyOpeningHours getHoursForDay(LocalDate date)
      Helper method to get the standard weekly opening hours for a specific date.
      Parameters:
      date - the date used to determine the day of the week.
      Returns:
      the standard WeeklyOpeningHours for that day.

    • createOrUpdateWeeklyOpeningHours

      public boolean createOrUpdateWeeklyOpeningHours(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Creates a new weekly opening hours entry or updates an existing one. If hours are updated, it triggers a check to cancel reservations that fall outside the new times.
      Parameters:
      hours - the WeeklyOpeningHours object to save.
      Returns:
      true if the operation was successful in the database.

    • removeWeeklyOpeningHours

      public boolean removeWeeklyOpeningHours(Day day)
      Removes a weekly opening hours entry for a specific day and cancels all reservations on that day.
      Parameters:
      day - the day of the week to remove.
      Returns:
      true if the day was successfully deleted from the database.

    • isDayExisting

      public boolean isDayExisting(Day day)
      Checks if a specific day of the week has opening hours defined in the local settings.
      Parameters:
      day - the day to check.
      Returns:
      true if the day exists in settings, false otherwise.

    • addSpecialDate

      public boolean addSpecialDate(SpecialDates specialDate)
      Adds a special date to the restaurant settings and database.
      Parameters:
      specialDate - the SpecialDates object to add.
      Returns:
      true if added to the database successfully.

    • deleteSpecialDate

      public boolean deleteSpecialDate(LocalDate date)
      Deletes a special date and cancels all reservations scheduled for that date.
      Parameters:
      date - the specific date to remove.
      Returns:
      true if the date was successfully deleted from the database.

    • updateSpecialDate

      public boolean updateSpecialDate(LocalDate oldDate, SpecialDates specialDate)
      Updates an existing special date entry with new details.
      Parameters:
      oldDate - the original date to be replaced/updated.
      specialDate - the new SpecialDates object with updated information.
      Returns:
      true if the database update was successful.

    • cancelConflictingReservations

      public void cancelConflictingReservations(WeeklyOpeningHours newHours)
      Identifies and cancels any future reservations that conflict with newly updated opening hours. Reservations falling outside the new opening or closing times will be cancelled.
      Parameters:
      newHours - the new WeeklyOpeningHours used for the conflict check.
